who: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates and renewals.
problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers discussions on contract management
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try monthly alert summaries and manual entry for 1-3 contracts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
